creator: gudfitz@gmail.com
text:
Portsnap operations on IPv6-enabled hosts directed to the your-org.portsnap.FreeBSD.org mirror are currently slow. A cursory investigation into the problem points at the AAAA record pointing to an unresponsive host:

% ping6 your-org.portsnap.freebsd.org                                                                          
*snip*
--- your-org.portsnap.freebsd.org ping6 statistics ---
6 packets transmitted, 0 packets received, 100.0% packet loss

I've attempted to ping the same address from various IPv6-enabled systems with the same result.
